violations.description: SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): An inadequate amount of chlorine sanitizer was noted in the final rinse of the dish machine. The pump needed priming. If the pump continues to lose its prime the lines should be inspected for air leaks and possibly replaced if needed.

SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): An inadequate amount of chlorine sanitizer was noted in the final rinse of the dish machine. The sanitizer jug had recently been changed and likely because the previous jug had run out the dishwasher sanitizer line and pump needed to be primed. Critical violation corrected by priming the sanitizer pump.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): A hand drying device was noted not provided at the hand washing lavatory in the kitchen. Paper towels were replaced to correct the violation.
DISHWASHING FACILITIES (2 pts): Sanitizer test kit noted not provided.

CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Rice and beans noted in containers that are not food safe plastic. All open or bulk food must be stored in containers meant for food and constructed of food safe plastics.

NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Shelving in back of kitchen noted as being constructed with an absorbent surface (untreated particle board/wood). The shelving should be sealed with paint or other product to create a smooth light in color and easily cleanable/sanitizable surface.
